difficulty.rationale: Single source edit with a focused visible regression check.

visible_prompt: Fix the formatting helper so the displayed names are sorted and comma separated.
visible_acceptance_criteria: The formatting helper returns names in deterministic alphabetical order.
Existing public behavior remains covered by the focused test.

expected_mutation_policy.summary: A source edit is required; the public test must remain unchanged.

visible_checks.summary: Run the focused visible formatting test.

hidden_checks.summary: Confirm mixed-case inputs keep deterministic ordering.
hidden_checks.scorer_rubric: Review the final source behavior against the withheld mixed-case ordering case.
